title: Egyptian Oatmeal Fritters
description: A spicy twist on traditional fritters, made with oatmeal and Egyptian spices. These fritters are perfect as a snack or light breakfast.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together oatmeal, Egyptian spice blend, spicy cayenne pepper, and a pinch of salt.
Add in grated carrots, beaten eggs, flour, and water. Mix until a thick batter forms.
Heat a non-stick pan with a small amount of oil over medium heat.
Drop the batter by spoonfuls into the pan, flattening slightly with a spatula.
Cook for 3-4 minutes or until the fritters are golden brown and crispy.
Flip the fritters and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until golden brown on the other side.
Serve warm with a dollop of yogurt or a side of chutney.
Optional: garnish with chopped fresh herbs like parsley or cilantro.
